pr.title: Record: 1.1140 BPB — ResidLambdas + Split-LR + Train-Budget GPTQ + Coprime Loader (12-seed mean)

output.summary: Combines residual lambdas with split early/late LR banks, cache/backout gating, MiLe loss, FlashAttention3, bigger hash/VE, and in-budget train-data GPTQ plus coprime loader.
techniques: - learnable per-sublayer residual lambdas paired with split Muon/Adam learning rates
- cache-and-backout gating with MiLe margin loss, expanded XSA, and enlarged bigram/VE layers
- in-budget train-data GPTQ calibration alongside FlashAttention3 and coprime-stride data loading
